name: my-dev-team-vs-code
description: An agentic chat participant for VS Code with tool-calling (read, search, run, write) and built-in feedback.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Triage, oneshot answers, /explain, and the read/search tools work in an untrusted folder; the side-effecting tools (run, write, edit) are disabled until you trust the workspace.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Reading, searching, writing, and editing files work in a virtual workspace; the run tool needs a local filesystem and is disabled there.

enumDescriptions: Run the agent pipeline inside the extension against your local Ollama server.
Not available yet: will run the same pipeline on a remote backend. Falls back to local with a warning.
myDevTeam.engine.description: Which engine handles @devteam requests. Read live; switching takes effect on the next request.

myDevTeam.model.description: What @devteam uses for the planner, answerer, and executor: a model id, a "provider:<name>" to route among one provider's models (best per task), or "auto" to let the router pick the best available model per agent. Triage always uses a local Ollama model. Use the /model command or the status-bar item to change it from a list.

myDevTeam.ollama.endpoint.description: Base URL of the Ollama server (origin only, no /api suffix). Model calls, error hints, and the startup health check all use this value.

myDevTeam.openai.baseUrl.description: Optional custom base URL for the OpenAI provider (an Azure or OpenAI-compatible gateway). Leave empty to use OpenAI's default endpoint. The API key is set with the "My Dev Team: Set API Key" command, not here.

myDevTeam.anthropic.baseUrl.description: Optional custom base URL for the Anthropic provider (a proxy or gateway). Leave empty to use Anthropic's default endpoint. The API key is set with the "My Dev Team: Set API Key" command, not here.

myDevTeam.groq.baseUrl.description: Optional custom base URL for the Groq provider (a proxy or gateway). Leave empty to use Groq's default endpoint. The API key is set with the "My Dev Team: Set API Key" command, not here.

myDevTeam.provider.requestsPerMinute.description: Maximum model requests per minute sent to each provider. Requests are spaced so no provider exceeds this rate, keeping a run under its quota (e.g. a Groq free-tier limit); applied per provider, so a local Ollama call never spends a cloud provider's budget. Set to 0 to disable throttling. A rate-limited (HTTP 429) request is always retried after the delay the provider suggests, regardless of this setting.

myDevTeam.run.commandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for shell commands started by the run tool. The whole process tree is killed when it expires.

myDevTeam.read.maxLines.description: Maximum number of lines the read tool returns per call. A partial result names the range shown and the file's total lines so the model can continue.

myDevTeam.search.globMaxResults.description: Maximum number of files a glob search returns.

myDevTeam.search.contentScanLimit.description: Maximum number of files a content search scans.

myDevTeam.search.contentMaxMatches.description: Maximum number of matches a content search collects before stopping early.

myDevTeam.chat.toolSnippetLines.description: Number of leading lines of a written file's contents shown as a snippet under the write call in the execution transcript. 0 hides the snippet.

myDevTeam.instructions.files.description: Project instruction files probed in the workspace root, in order; the first one found is given to the agents as standing instructions on every request. Plain file names only (no folders). An empty list turns the feature off.

myDevTeam.usage.showInChat.description: Append a Tokens line under each reply summing the run's input and output tokens. The status-bar session total and the My Dev Team: Show Token Usage report are independent of this setting.

myDevTeam.telemetry.evalLog.description: Store a local eval log of @devteam runs (route, per-step model and token usage, outcome) and thumbs up/down feedback as JSON lines in the extension's global storage. No prompts, file contents, or replies are recorded, and nothing leaves your machine. The My Dev Team: Show Token Usage report reads this log.

myDevTeam.telemetry.shadowTriage.description: On a slash-command run (which pins the route), also run triage in the background to record what it would have decided, so the Show Token Usage report can score triage against the command you chose. Adds one local triage call per pinned run and only collects data while the eval log is on. Off by default.

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Start fresh: drop the conversation so far from future requests.

commands.name: model
commands.description: Choose the model @devteam uses (or Auto to route by capability).

commands.name: compact
commands.description: Summarize the conversation so far; the summary then stands in for it.

commands.name: do
commands.description: Plan and execute workspace changes - no triage.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain a file, selection, or concept in the chat - no changes made.

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Diagnose a bug, fix its root cause, and verify the fix.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Draft the step-by-step plan but do not execute it.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review the attached code or selection - findings in chat, no edits.

commands.name: test
commands.description: Write or update tests for the target code, then run them.

languageModelTools.name: devteam__read
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the text of a workspace file given its relative path, up to a configured number of lines per call. Optional startLine/endLine select a 1-based inclusive range; a partial result names the range shown, the file's total lines, and the startLine to continue with.

path.description: Workspace-relative path of the file to read.

startLine.description: First line to read (1-based, inclusive). Defaults to 1.

endLine.description: Last line to read (1-based, inclusive). Defaults to the per-call line cap counted from startLine; clamped to it when larger.

languageModelTools.name: devteam__search
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the workspace for files matching a glob, or for text contained within files.

query.description: Glob pattern (e.g. **/*.ts) or text to search for.

mode.description: Whether to match file names by glob or search file contents for text.

languageModelTools.name: devteam__run
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a shell command in the workspace root. This is a side-effecting action and requires user confirmation.

languageModelTools.name: devteam__write
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create or overwrite a file in the workspace with the given contents. This is a side-effecting action and requires user confirmation.

path.description: Workspace-relative path of the file to create or update.

contents.description: The full new contents of the file.

languageModelTools.name: devteam__edit
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Replace text in an existing workspace file. The exact old text must match one place in the file. This is a side-effecting action and requires user confirmation.

path.description: Workspace-relative path of the existing file to edit.

oldText.description: The exact text to replace, copied verbatim from the file. Must match exactly one place; include surrounding lines to make it unique.
